subcodes.first_line: O Majíd! With Mine own hand have I nurtured thee, and within Mine exalted paradise have I planted thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مجید بدست خود تو را تربیت فرمودم و در رضوان منیع تو را غرس نمودم
subcodes.subjects: @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @spiritual transformation, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @fellowship with the wayward and ungodly
